commit_subject: sctp: Fix memory leak in sctp_sf_do_5_2_4_dupcook
notes: Generalized pattern: alloc-like call (e.g. *_new/*_alloc) -> gatekeeper-like fallible call (security_*, *_check, *_verify, *_register) -> early return without release.
Required bindingset[n] on the name-matching predicates; bare string parameter without binding produced 'n is not bound' errors.
Inline-attempted match-on-call binding via exists(string n) did not help; switched to bindingset[n] and explicit equality for short literal names.
